creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Jun 28 22:50:37 2013
New Revision: 322007
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322007

Log:
  deskutils/cairo-dock: update to 3.2.1
  
  - Update to 3.2.1 [1]
  - Remove ABI version from lib depends [1]
  - USES pkgconfig
  - Fix build with clang
  - Use space instead of tab for WWW
  
  Changes: http://glx-dock.org/bg_topic.php?t=6836
  
  PR:		ports/180032
  Submitted by:	Ivan Klymenko <fidaj@ukr.net> (maintainer) [1]

Added:
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt   (contents, props changed)
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-package-theme.sh   (contents, props changed)
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-src_gldit_gldi-config.h.in   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-applet-facility.c
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-class-manager.c
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-config.c
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-gui-factory.c
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-menu.c
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-package-theme
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock_theme-creator.sh
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-src__gldit__cairo-dock-keybinder.h
Modified:
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/distinfo
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/pkg-descr
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/pkg-plist

Modified: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile	Fri Jun 28 22:36:32 2013	(r322006)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile	Fri Jun 28 22:50:37 2013	(r322007)
@@ -1,33 +1,41 @@
-# Created by: Ivan Klymenko <fidaj@ukr.net>
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	cairo-dock
-DISTVERSION=	2.3.0~3
-PORTREVISION=	2
+DISTVERSION=	3.2.1
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils
-MASTER_SITES=	http://launchpadlibrarian.net/73753213/
+MASTER_SITES=	https://launchpadlibrarian.net/137290048/ \
+		http://pazzle.otdux.com.ua/
 
 MAINTAINER=	fidaj@ukr.net
 COMMENT=	Cairo-Dock is a light and eye-candy dock
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	cairo:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/cairo \
-		curl.6:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl \
-		dbus-glib-1.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/dbus-glib \
-		gtkglext-x11-1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtkglext
+		curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl \
+		dbus-glib-1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/dbus-glib \
+		gtkglext-x11-1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtkglext
 RUN_DEPENDS=	bash:${PORTSDIR}/shells/bash
 
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-3.2.1
+
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USE_GNOME=	gnomehack pkgconfig glib20 gtk20 librsvg2 libxml2
+USE_GNOME=	gnomehack glib20 gtk20 librsvg2 libxml2
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 USE_XORG=	xrender xtst
-USES=		cmake gettext
+USES=		cmake gettext pkgconfig
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
+CMAKE_ARGS+=    -Dinstall-pc-path:STRING="${LOCALBASE}/libdata/pkgconfig"
 
 MAN1=		cairo-dock.1
 MANCOMPRESSED=	yes
 
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|libdir}/pkgconfig|prefix}/libdata/pkgconfig| ; s|datadir}/man|prefix}/man|' \
-		${WRKSRC}/CMakeLists.txt ${WRKSRC}/src/gldit/CMakeLists.txt
+	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -type f -name "*" | ${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -i.orig -e \
+	    's|/usr/share/pixmaps/|${LOCALBASE}/share/pixmaps/|g; \
+	     s|/usr/bin/cairo-dock|${LOCALBASE}/bin/cairo-dock|g; \
+	     s|/bin/bash|${LOCALBASE}/bin/bash|g; \
+	     s|/usr/bin/*lay|${LOCALBASE}/bin/*lay|g; \
+	     s|/usr/share/applications|${LOCALBASE}/share/applications|g; \
+	     s|/usr/share/icons|${LOCALBASE}/share/icons|g'
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/cairo-dock/distinfo	Fri Jun 28 22:36:32 2013	(r322006)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/distinfo	Fri Jun 28 22:50:37 2013	(r322007)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cairo-dock-2.3.0~3.tar.gz) = 58de5a0bc75a83242bb6552f416b1db3bdb63f9de6f571aca362a7419b8b1db8
-SIZE (cairo-dock-2.3.0~3.tar.gz) = 2478330
+SHA256 (cairo-dock-3.2.1.tar.gz) = 441e407f92138dc604c796b0455777b765e298ecb8f3120104f521d0e0b34543
+SIZE (cairo-dock-3.2.1.tar.gz) = 2593954

Added: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt	Fri Jun 28 22:50:37 2013	(r322007)
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+--- ./CMakeLists.txt.orig	2013-04-05 00:40:07.000000000 +0300
++++ ./CMakeLists.txt	2013-05-04 16:34:01.000000000 +0300
+@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@
+ set (exec_prefix ${prefix})
+ set (datadir "${prefix}/${CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR}")  # (...)/share
+ set (pkgdatadir "${datadir}/${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}")  # (...)/cairo-dock
+-set (mandir "${prefix}/${CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR}")  # (...)/man
++set (mandir "${prefix}/man")  # (...)/man
+ 
+ if( CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 8 AND (force-lib64 OR "${FORCE_LIB64}" STREQUAL "yes"))  # 64bits and force install in lib64
+ 	set (libdir "${prefix}/lib64")
+@@ -90,7 +90,8 @@
+ 
+ ########### dependencies ###############
+ 
+-set (packages_required "glib-2.0 gthread-2.0 cairo librsvg-2.0 dbus-1 dbus-glib-1 libxml-2.0 xrender gl glu libcurl")  # for the .pc and to have details
++set (packages_required "glib-2.0 cairo librsvg-2.0 dbus-1 dbus-glib-1 libxml-2.0 xrender gl glu libcurl")  # for the .pc and to have details
++find_library (GTHREAD "gthread-2.0")
+ STRING (REGEX REPLACE " " ";" packages_required_semicolon ${packages_required})  # replace blank space by semicolon => to have more details if a package is missing
+ pkg_check_modules ("PACKAGE" REQUIRED "${packages_required_semicolon}")
+ 
+@@ -143,9 +144,9 @@
+ endif()
+ 
+ check_include_files ("dlfcn.h" HAVE_DLFCN_H)
+-check_library_exists (dl dlopen "" HAVE_LIBDL)
++check_library_exists (c dlopen "" HAVE_LIBDL)
+ if (HAVE_LIBDL)  # dlopen might be in libc directly as in FreeBSD
+-	set (LIBDL_LIBRARIES "dl")
++	set (LIBDL_LIBRARIES "c")
+ endif()
+ if (NOT HAVE_DLFCN_H)
+ 	message(FATAL_ERROR "Cairo-Dock requires dlfcn.h")

Added: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-package-theme.sh
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-cairo-dock-package-theme.sh	Fri Jun 28 22:50:37 2013	(r322007)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- ./data/scripts/cairo-dock-package-theme.sh.orig	2013-03-23 17:55:12.000000000 +0200
++++ ./data/scripts/cairo-dock-package-theme.sh	2013-06-27 18:03:18.000000000 +0300
+@@ -125,7 +125,7 @@
+ 	if test "x${theme}" != "x"; then
+ 		#\__________ On cherche si ce theme est un theme officiel ou non.
+ 		echo "un theme est present ($theme)"
+-		wget "$THEME_SERVER/$3/list.conf" -O "liste.tmp" -t 3 -T 30
++		fetch -o "liste.tmp" -T 30 "$THEME_SERVER/$3/list.conf"
+ 		if test -f "liste.tmp" ; then
+ 			grep "^\[${theme}\]" "liste.tmp"
+ 			if test "$?" != "0" -a  "$theme" != "Classic" -a "$theme" != "default"; then  # pas un theme officiel

Added: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-src_gldit_gldi-config.h.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-src_gldit_gldi-config.h.in	Fri Jun 28 22:50:37 2013	(r322007)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- ./src/gldit/gldi-config.h.in.orig	2013-05-04 16:23:45.000000000 +0300
++++ ./src/gldit/gldi-config.h.in	2013-05-04 16:23:57.000000000 +0300
+@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
+ #cmakedefine HAVE_LIBCRYPT @HAVE_LIBCRYPT@
+ 
+ /* Define to 1 if you have the `dl' library (-ldl). */
+-#cmakedefine HAVE_LIBDL @HAVE_LIBDL@
++//#cmakedefine HAVE_LIBDL @HAVE_LIBDL@
+ 
+ /* Define to 1 if you have the <dlfcn.h> header file. */
+ #cmakedefine HAVE_DLFCN_H @HAVE_DLFCN_H@

+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/pkg-descr	Fri Jun 28 22:50:37 2013	(r322007)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ Cairo / OpenGL to render nice graphics (
 hardware acceleration. It's fully configurable and customizable and can be a
 taskbar too. You can easily plug applets into it or in a desklet mode.
 
-WWW:	https://launchpad.net/cairo-dock
+WWW: https://launchpad.net/cairo-dock
